title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Marks & Spencer India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Marks & Spencer India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Srinagar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Marks & Spencer India:
Marks & Spencer India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Marks & Spencer India!
